overall.description: Spider-Man perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-like urban intersection in a video game. The scene features towering glass buildings with bright digital billboards, busy streets with traffic and pedestrians below, and clear sunny weather.

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man sits perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-like intersection. The view shows towering glass buildings with bright digital billboards, a busy multi-lane street with moderate traffic below, and clear sunny weather. Birds occasionally fly past the building while the camera remains stationary behind the character.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric perspective from a high skyscraper ledge overlooking a vibrant, sun-drenched urban intersection. It begins with Spider-Man perched silently in the foreground, framing a vast vista of towering glass buildings and brilliant digital billboards. As the camera holds its position, the bustling energy of the city unfolds below through the movement of moderate traffic flowing across multi-lane streets. The scene remains focused on this expansive cityscape, punctuated only by the occasional flight of birds passing the building under a clear, bright sky.
